subject: Problem in relion refinement steps pre M
body: I am encountering an issue with the RELION 5.0-tomo pipeline during the refinement of bacterial ribosomes. While the process runs smoothly initially, it consistently fails at the M-step of the final converged iteration. Particles: 14,771. Box Size: 403 pixels (at 10 Å/px). Upstream Tool: WarpTools. RELION Version: 5.0.0-17-gadfec821. Hardware: NVIDIA A10 GPUs (24 GB VRAM per card). I suspect a potential memory bottleneck. Tested on both 4-GPU and 8-GPU configurations. Error: corrupted size vs. prev_size, signal Aborted (6). Stack trace shows crash in fftw_malloc_plain during BackProjector::reconstruct in MlOptimiserMpi::maximization.
